productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Blk Casual Black Shoe
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these leather sneakers from red tape. The rugged design coupled with high quality materials makes this pair a great choice for everyday casual wear. Team this with jeans, tees and sporty jackets for a cool look.Upper Rugged leather uppers  for comfort and protection Sneaker design with fabric tape overlays and stitch detailing for greater style Lace-ups for a snug Fit Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for added comfort Brand name embossed on the tongue Midsole Fabric footbed with brand name on the heel PU midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with suction lugs on the periphery of the shoe for greater grip over smooth surfaces Multi-directional pattern and placement of serrated lugs on the periphery of the shoe for greater grip Shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
